query:
ALTER TABLE notifications MODIFY COLUMN type ENUM(
  'booking_confirmation',
  'booking_reminder',
  'booking_reminder_24h',
  'booking_reminder_2h',
  'booking_cancelled',
  'booking_blocked_cancellation',
  'payment_success',
  'payment_failed',
  'credit_added',
  'noshow_registered',
  'professional_approved',
  'professional_blocked',
  'general'
) NOT NULL;
